semantic_description: Organization department tree structure capturing hierarchical units: department name, code, parent department (recursive tree), status. Primary key for approval workflow routing, cost center allocation, and organizational visibility. Supports multi-level nesting.
lifecycle_description: ACTIVE ↔ INACTIVE (binary toggle; no multi-step workflow)

semantic_description: Position definition within organization hierarchy: position name, code, associated department, level (staff/supervisor/manager/director/VP/CEO), job description. Master data for employee assignment, approval authority matrix, and role-based access control.
lifecycle_description: ACTIVE ↔ INACTIVE (binary toggle on organizational restructure)

description: Employee with reporting line for approval routing
semantic_description: Employee record with identity, assignment, and reporting line: employee name, code, department, position, hire date, employee type (full-time/part-time/contractor), contact (email, phone), report-to manager (self-referential FK), status. Critical data subject for approval routing and organizational visibility.
